title: Oakland Gardens Wire Hanging Baskets 12 Inch (30cm) Hanging Planter for Indoor and Outdoor Use|Green Coated Steel Frame with Zinc-Coated Steel Chains|Ideal for Home Decor Garden Decoration|Pack of 1
features: 𝐃𝐮𝐫𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐒𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐝𝐲: Made from high-quality green coated steel, our hanging baskets are designed to last. The frame is rust-resistant and weatherproof, perfect for both indoor and outdoor use.
𝐇𝐞𝐚𝐯𝐲-𝐃𝐮𝐭𝐲 𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐢𝐧𝐬: Each basket comes with zinc-coated steel chains and a hook with a breaking strain of up to 25kg, ensuring your plants or decorative items are securely hung in any location.

𝐕𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐥𝐞 𝐇𝐚𝐧𝐠𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐎𝐩𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬: Ideal for hanging on walls, fences, pillars, or doorways. These baskets are perfect for adding a touch of greenery to any space, whether in your garden, balcony, patio, or even inside your home.
𝐀𝐯𝐚𝐢𝐥𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐢𝐧 𝐌𝐮𝐥𝐭𝐢𝐩𝐥𝐞 𝐒𝐢𝐳𝐞𝐬: Choose from 12", 14", 16", or 18" baskets to suit your space and plant size. Each basket comes with a durable chain, adding elegance to your garden or home decor.

𝐆𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐑𝐞𝐚𝐥 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐀𝐫𝐭𝐢𝐟𝐢𝐜𝐢𝐚𝐥 𝐏𝐥𝐚𝐧𝐭𝐬: Whether you prefer live plants or artificial ones, these baskets are perfect for showcasing your favorite greenery. They make an excellent alternative to traditional pots and planters.
description: Transform your living space, garden, or balcony with our Wire Hanging Baskets, available in various sizes to suit your needs. Crafted from a green coated steel frame, these baskets are built to withstand the elements, making them ideal for both indoor and outdoor use. The round bottom design offers a classic look, while the zinc-coated steel chains ensure durability and safety, supporting up to 25kg. Our hanging baskets are not just functional; they’re also a beautiful addition to your decor. Whether you hang them on walls, fences, or doorways, they’re sure to brighten up any bland space. Perfect for holding real or artificial plants, these baskets offer a versatile solution for showcasing your favorite flowers, herbs, or decorative items. Choose the size that fits your needs, from the compact 12" basket to the larger 18" option, all of which come with strong, easy-to-install chains. Ideal as gardening gifts for mum or dad, these baskets are a thoughtful and practical present for any gardening enthusiast. Make your garden or home stand out with these stylish and durable hanging baskets. Whether you're planting petunias, lobelias, or even strawberries, these baskets provide the perfect environment for your plants to thrive. Create your own garden oasis with our Wire Hanging Baskets today! 𝐒𝐢𝐳𝐞 𝐎𝐩𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬: 𝟏𝟐" 𝐁𝐚𝐬𝐤𝐞𝐭: 30cm wide x 15cm deep, Total height including chain - 51cm. 𝟏𝟒" 𝐁𝐚𝐬𝐤𝐞𝐭: 35cm wide x 17.5cm deep, Total height including chain - 60cm. 𝟏𝟔" 𝐁𝐚𝐬𝐤𝐞𝐭: 40cm wide x 21cm deep, Total height including chain - 65cm. 𝟏𝟖" 𝐁𝐚𝐬𝐤𝐞𝐭:45cm wide x 22.5cm deep, Total height including chain - 69cm.
